current_strategic_direction: AI-generated recommendation in -> AI Trust Decision Record out
current_priority: Complete the immediate five-build sequence around report polish, feedback integration, route consistency, canonical record unification, and verified Google Sheet capture before broader platform expansion.
public_buyer_problem: Before relying on AI, know whether the recommendation is defensible.
aegis_boundary: Aegis remains internal. CyberShield may reference Aegis as supporting architecture internally, but Aegis must not dominate public buyer messaging.

versioning_schema.user_facing_rule: Do not display internal build or prototype versions in the application or user-facing reports.

required_decision_assurance_steps: Identify missing, weak, stale, self-attested, or contradictory evidence
Require Meaningful Human Authority where needed
Generate a canonical AI Trust Decision Record

current_capture_source_of_truth.status_rule: Do not claim Google Sheet success until an actual row is verified.

deferred_but_preserved.aegis_public_positioning: Internal only until owner approves a public Aegis strategy.
deferred_but_preserved.trustmap: Deferred supporting view. Do not rebuild TrustMap-first navigation.
deferred_but_preserved.runtime_agents: Deferred. No autonomous runtime enforcement in the current build.
deferred_but_preserved.broad_governance_dashboards: Deferred until the vendor-risk record workflow is proven.
deferred_but_preserved.multi_industry_demos: Deferred until vendor-risk is stable and externally reviewed.
deferred_but_preserved.generic_trust_scores: Avoid. Use explainable bands and findings.
deferred_but_preserved.autonomous_approval: Prohibited for the current product boundary.
deferred_but_preserved.production_readiness_claims: Prohibited unless implemented, tested, and owner-approved.
deferred_but_preserved.live_llm_analysis: Do not claim unless implemented and tested.

historical_documents_rule: Historical documents remain for provenance but must not override the current forward plan, start-here guide, architecture library status, current configuration, route manifest, or requirements traceability matrix.
prototype_boundary: Static software-assisted advisory prototype. Do not claim autonomous approval, live compliance certification, legal determination, audit opinion, production enforcement, live evidence retrieval, enterprise evidence storage, tenant isolation enforcement, backend persistence, or live model-backed analysis unless implemented and tested.
core_doctrine: AI confidence is not evidence. The question is not whether the AI sounded confident, but whether the organization can defend acting on the recommendation based on the evidence available at the time.
